name: saasan
description: Saasan - Anti-corruption platform for Nepal with viral features

scripts.setup:all: pnpm install:all && pnpm setup:env && pnpm seed:smart
scripts.install:all: pnpm install concurrently && concurrently "pnpm install" "cd saasan-be-nest && pnpm install" "cd saasan-dashboard-react && pnpm install" "cd saasan-mobile-react && pnpm install" "cd saasan-politician-react && pnpm install"
scripts.setup:env: concurrently "cp saasan-be-nest/.env.example saasan-be-nest/.env" "cp saasan-dashboard-react/.env.example saasan-dashboard-react/.env" "cp saasan-mobile-react/.env.example saasan-mobile-react/.env" "cp saasan-politician-react/.env.example saasan-politician-react/.env"

author: Saasan Team
